title: Tensura: KumoDesu
description: An addon that adds some species from the light novel ‘So I'm a Spider, So What?’ and skills.
body:
![KumoDesu Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2746ba85fc827b8f652d73d99e146f7fef5244c7.png)


_Evolution Requirements, granted skills, and stats are subject to change and are currently temporary_

_KumoDesu currently adds the whole anime PV1 race tree and multiple skills where most are placeholders for now!_

### Note that this race is fairly difficult at the start for the moment.

![Health](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb10b0eaa21bedb5543ded97624742e20fa0bedb.png)
                                     
# EVOLUTION TREES
## OGRES (NOT YET PRESENT IN 1.21.1)
HEAVILY WIP, ONLY WRATH ONI HAS A MODEL FOR NOW

**Ogre**
->
**Ogre Shaman (10 Elemental Essences, 10 Demon Essences and EP)**
*gets Thought Acceleration*
->
**High Ogre (EP)**
*gets Steel Strength, Strengthen Body*
->
**Ogre General (EP)**
*gets Thought Communication*
->
**Ogre King (EP)**
*gets Infinite Regeneration*
->
**Wrath Oni (Sin, EP)** or **Divine Fighter (EP)**
*Wrath Oni gets: Divine Ki Release, Severer, Absolute Severance*
## TARATECTS
![Evo Tree](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/62dd97b450812352b9018109b63ad61d79c7a406.png)
Poison: Race path that specializes in deadly poisons.

Spec: Race path that's between Poison and Monster, they have the best of both worlds.

Monster: Race path that specializes in brute strength and tankiness.

Other: Races that don't fit any archetypes.

Hidden:


<details>
<summary>Orthocadinaht Clue</summary>

### Orthocadinaht

You need to have an incredibly strong connection to spirits to see this evolution as Zoa Ele or Poison Taratect.

</details>





<details>
<summary>Zana Horowa Clue</summary>

### Zana Horowa

You need to be uniquely sinful to see this evolution as Ede Saine.

</details>

# FUTURE
